articles.title: AbCellera reports Q1 2026 results
articles.summary: Revenue ~$8M, net loss $43.2M; ABCL635 Phase 2 readout expected Q3 2026.

articles.title: Arcturus Q1 revenue falls as CSL partnership write-down weighs
articles.summary: Q1 revenue $2.1M vs $29.4M YoY; cash $213M; Phase 2 readouts pending.
